meta.title: Donnie Darko — Illustrated Playthrough
meta.calibration: ALL coordinates below are PLACEHOLDERS (canvas-local, 0..800 x 0..500). Replace x/y from the stills/video. Likewise verify every `navigate` URL and tune wait thresholds. Steps marked `action.type:none` just wait for an auto-forwarding animation.

steps.caption: Click the bullseye to begin.
steps.note: CALIBRATED 2026-05-30 against live site. Red bullseye in the Win98 popup. startUrl loads intro.swf (polyfilled <object><embed>).

steps.caption: Click the target again to proceed.
steps.note: CALIBRATED 2026-05-30. Same reticle position as step 1 (intro is repeated bullseye clicks). diffThreshold loosened — intro background animates (scanlines/glass).

steps.caption: (Optional cheat) A pop-up asks for a password — enter “breathe”. Otherwise just proceed.
steps.note: Optional. If you skip the cheat, change action.type to none and click PROCEED instead. TODO field coords.

steps.caption: The screen forwards automatically.
steps.note: Pure animation gate — no input. Lengthen maxWaitMs if the intro is long.

steps.caption: Detention-centre report on DARKO, DONALD J. asks “C:>MORE?(Y/N)”. Type Y, then Y again at the police report. (N goes nowhere.)
steps.note: Two Y prompts in sequence. This step presses Y once; you'll likely need a second key step (id 05b) for the police report — split during calibration.

steps.caption: At the main menu, click the “o” circle for level one (the active one).
steps.note: TODO coords. Likely same loaded movie as the intro (menu.swf/clouds.swf) — no navigate.

steps.caption: “things aren't that simple” — click the “o” circle (“she died alone”).
steps.note: TODO coords.

steps.caption: A Middlesex Times Dispatch obituary for Roberta Sparrow pops up.
steps.note: Observe-only; the popup opened from step 07.

steps.caption: Close the obituary, then click the second “o” circle (“let no one know I gave you this”) — opens an obituary for Dr. Kenneth Monnitoff. Close it.
steps.note: TODO coords. Closing the popup is a separate click — split into 09a (close) / 09b (second circle) during calibration.

steps.caption: A third circle appears (“a guide in a time of great danger”). Click it; the password prompt “her name was that of a bird” = “sparrow”.
steps.note: TODO: click the circle first (action 10a:click), then type the password. Password = sparrow.

steps.caption: Karen P. Monnitoff's letter (gift of the book of time travel). Click the screen.
steps.note: TODO coords.

steps.caption: “DO YOU BELIEVE IN TIME TRAVEL?” — click the question to reach the Tangent area.
steps.note: TODO coords. In-Flash link drives the navigation.

steps.caption: Click the boxes — a Frank box appears saying “smurf” (a password). Close it; leads to the Tangent Universe.
steps.note: TODO coords. Remember the word: smurf.

steps.caption: Click the red dot — a popup opens; click inside it; another opens; click inside the second; a third opens between them; click inside it.
steps.note: VERIFY URL. Sequence of nested popups = several clicks — split into 14a..14d during calibration.

steps.caption: The 3 popups close, 4 new boxes open — click boxes until they start to fade away.
steps.note: Repeated clicks; calibrate count.

steps.caption: “you found me… remember the word?” — password = “smurf”.
steps.note: TODO field coords.

steps.caption: 4 smurf boxes appear — click any box; they change to Donnie's letter to Roberta Sparrow. Click the word “breathe”.
steps.note: TODO: word coords for “breathe”.

steps.caption: The smurf boxes go away and a popup of Roberta appears. Close the window.
steps.note: TODO close-button coords.

steps.caption: Click the red dot — “The Philosophy of Time Travel”. Clicking each dot reveals its book page on the right; moving the cursor across it makes it more visible.
steps.note: Exploratory section. Original guide exits by reloading and choosing level 2 (next step navigates there).

steps.caption: Back at the main menu, click the “o” for level two.
steps.note: Reload to menu then click level-two circle. TODO coords.

steps.caption: “enter the password from level 1” = “breathe”.
steps.note: TODO field coords.

steps.caption: Click the cross — goes to the “are you sleepgolfing?” section.
steps.note: VERIFY URL (index.html vs main.html). TODO coords.

steps.caption: At the golf course, click the red square (“don't be a prisoner of fear”) — pops a Jim Cunningham article. Close it.
steps.note: TODO coords; closing the article is a follow-up click.

steps.caption: Another red square (“wake up donnie!”) appears — click it. Stripes + Donnie/2 golfers appear (“place an x on the lifeline”). Click the 2 golfers.
steps.note: TODO: red square then golfers coords (two clicks).

steps.caption: Chalkboard screen — click the TV. Exercise #1 appears; mark the correct spot on the lifeline (a wrong mark won't advance). Repeat for exercise #2.
steps.note: Puzzle with required correct answers — multiple precise clicks. Calibrate the correct lifeline marks from the video.

steps.caption: Donnie's confrontation with his teacher — click TV-Frank; an ASCII bunny overlaps Donnie. Click TV-Frank again.
steps.note: Two clicks on TV-Frank. TODO coords.

steps.caption: Frank popups fill the screen spelling “WAKE UP DONNIE”. Click inside one of the windows; the screen forwards.
steps.note: TODO coords.

steps.caption: Back at the golf course: “do you think he was sleepgolfing?” — click Donnie.
steps.note: TODO coords.

steps.caption: Donnie wakes up; click the white arrow. Popup asks “who found the wallet?” — enter “ling ling” (or skip; it advances either way).
steps.note: TODO: click white arrow first (29a), then type. Password optional.

steps.caption: Sidewalk screen (“i've been waiting for you”). Click the “o” dot — a popup of Donnie looking at Jim's wallet appears. Click inside it.
steps.note: TODO coords; two clicks (dot, then inside popup).

steps.caption: Red lines remain — click the blinking red dot at the tip of the longest line. Pops a Cunning Visions article.
steps.note: TODO blinking-dot coords.

steps.caption: Burn it down / Sparkle Motion. Click the dot at top — a picture of Donnie walking home appears. Right-click the screen and play/forward the animation of Donnie finding the wallet.
steps.note: VERIFY URL. The play step needs a RIGHT-click (Ruffle context menu / play) — add a 32b step with action.button:right. TODO coords.

steps.caption: Auto-popup of Jim's licence with rollovers (45a Rose Street, Middlesex, VA 23245). Click inside the window.
steps.note: Note the address — Rose Street → level 3 password is “rose”.

steps.caption: Sparkle Motion dancers / fire popups / “burn it down now you know where he lives”. Click inside the popups.
steps.note: Multiple popup clicks.

steps.caption: Popup of Donnie at the fire. Click inside it.
steps.note: TODO coords.

steps.caption: “burn it down donnie.” Automatically forwards back to the main menu.
steps.note: Animation gate, no input.

steps.caption: At the main menu, click the “o” for level three.
steps.note: TODO coords.

steps.caption: Popup: “The password for Level three is the name of the street he lives in… like the flower.” = “rose”.
steps.note: TODO field coords.

steps.caption: “They made me do it!” / From the Sky. Click the location (Middlesex).
steps.note: VERIFY URL. TODO location coords.

steps.caption: Popup of a chandelier — click inside it. A JS spoiler warning / article on the missing plane's engine pops up. Close the article.
steps.note: TODO coords; closing the article is a follow-up click.

steps.caption: Click the telephone symbol inside the chandelier popup. FAA info appears — click “launch the document” at the bottom.
steps.note: Two clicks (phone icon, then launch). If it doesn't show, a reload is sometimes needed.

steps.caption: Engine phone-conversation transcript plays; the screen then changes automatically.
steps.note: Long audio/animation gate. phone.swf is MP3 dialogue — may run a while.

steps.caption: “time is up, donnie. /// fin. kaput. done. the end.”
steps.note: Final settled end-state.
